title: Shiva as the Cosmic Dancer – Fountain Sculpture in Char Dham Vrindavan.jpg
source_url: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Shiva as the Cosmic Dancer – Fountain Sculpture in Char Dham Vrindavan.jpg
description: A grand statue of Lord Shiva as Nataraja, standing atop the demon of ignorance, with flames and damaru in hand, symbolizing cosmic rhythm and spiritual liberation.
